nasb.text: Thus all flesh will know that I, the Lord, have drawn My sword out of its sheath. It will not return to its sheath again.” ’

esv.text: And all flesh shall know that I am the Lord. I have drawn my sword from its sheath; it shall not be sheathed again.

cnv.text: 所有的人就知道我耶和華已經拔刀出鞘，刀必不再入鞘了。’

ccb.text: 使世人都知道我耶和华已拔刀出鞘，不再收回。’
